fields.label: APN Policy Override APNs
fields.description: Whether override APNs are disabled or enabled. @see DevicePolicyManager.setOverrideApnsEnabled for more details.

fields.label: APN Policy APN Settings
fields.description: APN settings for override APNs. There must not be any conflict between any of the APN settings provided, otherwise the policy will be rejected. Two ApnSettings are considered to conflict when all following fields match on both: `numericOperatorId` `apn` `proxyAddress` `proxyPort` `mmsProxyAddress` `mmsProxyPort` `mmsc` `mvnoType` `protocol` `roamingProtocol` If some of the APN settings result in non-compliance of. INVALID_VALUE, they will be ignored. This can be set on fully managed devices on Android 10 and above. This can also be set on work profiles on Android 13 and above and only with ApnSetting's with ENTERPRISE APN type. A `NonComplianceDetail` with API_LEVEL is reported if the Android version is less than 10. A `NonComplianceDetail` with MANAGEMENT_MODE is reported for work profiles on Android versions less than 13.

fields.label: SSID

If possible the HexSSID is decoded using UTF-8, otherwise an encoding is guessed on a best effort basis.

fields.label: DNS Settings Server Name
fields.description: The hostname of a DNS-over-TLS server used to validate the server certificate, as defined in RFC 7858. If no serverAddresses are provided, the hostname will be used to determine the server addresses. This key must be present only if the DNSProtocol is TLS.

fields.label: DNS Settings Server URL
fields.description: The URI template of a DNS-over-HTTPS server, as defined in RFC 8484. This URL must use the https:// scheme, and the hostname or address in the URL will be used to validate the server certificate. If no serverAddresses are provided, the hostname or address in the URL will be used to determine the server addresses. This key must be present only if the DNSProtocol is HTTPS.

fields.label: DNS Settings Supplemental Match Domains
fields.description: A list of domain strings used to determine which DNS queries will use the DNS server. If this array is not provided, all domains will use the DNS server. A single wildcard * prefix is supported, but is not required. For example, both *.example.com and example.com match against mydomain.example.com and your.domain.example.com, but do not match against mydomain-example.com.

fields.label: Prohibit Disablement
fields.description: If `true`, prohibits users from disabling DNS settings. This key is only available on supervised devices. Default: false.

fields.label: Denied Bundle Identifiers
fields.description: An array of bundle identifiers of apps that don’t use SSO provided by this extension. Available in iOS 15 and later, and macOS 12 and later.

fields.label: Extension Data
fields.description: A dictionary of arbitrary data passed through to the app extension.

fields.label: Extension Identifier
fields.description: The bundle identifier of the app extension that performs SSO for the specified URLs (Required) .

fields.label: Hosts
fields.description: An array of host or domain names that apps can authenticate through the app extension. Required for Credential payloads. Ignored for Redirect payloads. The system: Matches host or domain names case-insensitively Requires that all the host and domain names of all installed Extensible SSO payloads are unique Note: Host names that begin with a “.” are wildcard suffixes that match all subdomains; otherwise the host name needs be an exact match.

fields.label: Platform SSO Account Display Name
fields.description: The display name for the account in notifications and authentication requests.

fields.label: Platform SSO Additional Groups
fields.description: The list of created groups that don’t have administrator access.

fields.label: Platform SSO Administrator Groups
fields.description: The list of groups to use for administrator access. The system requests membership during authentication.

fields.label: Platform SSO Authorization Groups
fields.description: The pairing of Authorization Rights to group names. The system updates the Authorization Right to use the group when used.

fields.label: Platform SSO Enable Authorization
fields.description: Enables using identity provider accounts at authorization prompts. Requires that UseSharedDeviceKeys is true. The system assigns groups using AdministratorGroups, AdditionalGroups, or AuthorizationGroups.

fields.label: Platform SSO Enable Create User At Login
fields.description: Enables creating new users at the login window with an AuthenticationMethod of either Password or SmartCard. Requires that UseSharedDeviceKeys is true.

fields.label: Platform SSO Login Frequency
fields.description: The duration, in seconds, until the system requires a full login instead of a refresh. The default value is 64,800 (18 hours). The minimum value is 3600 (1 hour).

fields.label: Platform SSO New User Authorization Mode
Platform SSO Token To User Mapping
Platform SSO Token To User Mapping Account Name
fields.description: The claim name to use for the user’s account name.

fields.label: Platform SSO Token To User Mapping Full Name
fields.description: The claim name to use for the user’s full name.

fields.label: Platform SSO Use Shared Device Keys
fields.description: If true, the system uses the same signing and encryption keys for all users.

fields.label: Platform SSO FileVault Policy
fields.description: The policy to apply when using Platform SSO at FileVault unlock on Apple Silicon Macs. Applies when. AuthenticationMethod is Password. Available in macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Platform SSO Login Policy
fields.description: The policy to apply when using Platform SSO at the login window. Applies when AuthenticationMethod is Password. Available in macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Platform SSO Unlock Policy
fields.description: The policy to apply when using Platform SSO at screensaver unlock. Applies when AuthenticationMethod is Password. Available in macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Platform SSO Offline Grace Period
fields.description: The amount of time after the last successful Platform SSO login a local account password can be used offline. Required when 'AllowOfflineGracePeriod' is set.

fields.label: Platform SSO Authentication Grace Period
fields.description: The amount of time after a 'FileVaultPolicy', 'LoginPolicy', or 'UnlockPolicy' is received or updated that unregistered local accounts can be used. Required when 'AllowAuthenticationGracePeriod' is set.

fields.label: Platform SSO Non Platform SSO Accounts
fields.description: The list of local accounts that are not subject to the 'FileVaultPolicy', 'LoginPolicy', or 'UnlockPolicy'. The accounts are also not prompted to register for Platform SSO.

fields.label: Realm
fields.description: The realm name for Credential payloads. Use proper capitalization for this value. Ignored for Redirect payloads.

fields.label: Registration Token
fields.description: The token this device uses for registration with Platform SSO. Use it for silent registration with the Identity. Provider. Requires that AuthenticationMethod isn’t empty. Available in macOS 13 and later.

fields.label: Team Identifier
fields.description: The team identifier of the app extension. This key is required on macOS and ignored elsewhere.

fields.label: Urls
fields.description: An array of URL prefixes of identity providers where the app extension performs SSO. Required for Redirect payloads. Ignored for Credential payloads. The URLs need to begin with http:// or https://. The system: Matches scheme and host name case-insensitively Does not allow query parameters and URL fragments Requires that the URLs of all installed Extensible SSO payloads are unique .

fields.label: Calculator Basic Mode
fields.description: If present, configures the basic mode of the calculator. Basic mode is always enabled.

fields.label: Calculator Basic Mode Add Square Root
Calculator Input Modes
fields.description: If present, controls global input options of the calculator. If not present, all input modes are enabled.

fields.label: Calculator Math Notes Mode
fields.description: If present, configures the Math Notes mode of the calculator. If not present, Math Notes mode is enabled.

fields.label: Calculator Programmer Mode
fields.description: If present, configures the programmer mode of the calculator. If not present, programmer mode is enabled.

fields.label: Calculator Scientific Mode
fields.description: If present, configures the scientific mode of the calculator. If not present, scientific mode is enabled.

fields.label: System Behavior
fields.description: If present, configures math behavior in the system.

fields.label: Raw Content
fields.description: The xml payload content of the configuration. Will be parsed and validated each time the configuration is updated.

fields.label: Payload Content
fields.description: Holds the parsed "PayloadContent" of rawContent.

fields.label: Second Level Payload Type
fields.description: The payload type of the content, will be identified by parsing the content. Will be used as return type of getType(). Needs to be stored as separate property. Simply adding a "setType" will not persist the value in the resulting json, as the "type" property is already used to determine the. JsonSubType.

fields.label: Notification Settings
fields.description: An array of notification settings dictionaries (required).

fields.label: New Tab Start Page
fields.description: Sets the start page for new tabs in Safari.

fields.label: New Tab Start Page Extension Identifier
New Tab Start Page Homepage URL
New Tab Start Page Page Type
Automatic Actions
fields.description: This object configures various automatic Software Update functionality.

fields.label: Beta
fields.description: Note: only allow configuring "allowed" or "always off" for now. The other beta options require integration to retrieve seeding service tokens from ASM/ASB, which is not supported at this moment.

fields.label: Deferrals
fields.description: The object that configures update deferrals.

fields.label: Rapid Security Response
fields.description: These configurations set user access to interacting with Background Security Improvement.

fields.label: Time Zone
fields.description: The Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA) time zone database name. If forceAutomaticDateAndTime or forceAutomaticDateAndTime is set, this setting fails with an error. Otherwise, setting this value disables automatic time zone logic. The user can still change the time zone by, for example, switching automatic date and time back on. The intention is to allow setting the time zone when automatic determination is not available, e.g. when location services are disabled.

fields.label: Login Screen Domain Auto Complete
fields.description: Determines whether the domain name is autocompleted on the sign-in screen of a managed ChromeOS device. Default value: false.

fields.label: Login Screen Domain Auto Complete Prefix
fields.description: Autocomplete domain prefix. Specifies the domain name to autocomplete on a managed ChromeOS device. Dependencies: loginScreenDomainAutoComplete: true .

fields.label: Device Login Screen System Info Enforced

fields.label: Start Time
fields.description: The start time when the devices should be locked due to lost mode activation.

fields.label: End Time
fields.description: The end time when a device should be unlocked due to lost mode deactivation.

fields.label: Minutes Until Failed Login Reset
fields.description: On macOS, this can be set to the number of minutes before the login will be reset after the maxFailedAttempts unsuccessful attempts has been reached. This key requires setting maxFailedAttempts. macOS 10.10+

fields.label: Denied Icci Ds For RCS
fields.description: An array of strings representing ICCIDs of cellular plans. The device prevents use of any matching cellular networks with RCS messaging. The array must contain no more than 4 ICCID strings.

fields.label: Denied Icci Ds Fori Message Face Time
fields.description: An array of strings representing ICCIDs of cellular plans. The device prevents use of any matching cellular networks in iMessage and FaceTime. The array must contain no more than 4 ICCID strings.

fields.label: Allow Video Conferencing Remote Control
fields.description: If false, disables the ability for a remote FaceTime session to request control of the device. Available in iOS 18.4 and later on supervised devices.

fields.label: Allow Default Messaging App Modification
fields.description: If false, disables default messaging app preference modification. The MDM Settings command to set the default messaging app preference still works when this is applied. Available in iOS 18.4 and later.

fields.label: Allow Default Calling App Modification
fields.description: If false, disables default calling app preference modification. The MDM Settings command to set the default calling app preference still works when this is applied. Available in iOS 18.4 and later.

fields.label: Allow Safari Summary
fields.description: If false, the system disables the ability to summarize content in Safari. Available in iOS 18.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Mail Smart Replies
fields.description: If false, disables smart replies in Mail. Available in iOS 18.2.

fields.label: Allow Apple Intelligence Report
fields.description: If false, the system disables Apple Intelligence reports. Available in iOS 18.4.

fields.label: Allow Visual Intelligence Summary
fields.description: If false, the system disables visual intelligence summarization. Available in iOS 18.3 and later.

fields.label: Allow Satellite Connection
fields.description: If false, the system prohibits the connection to and use of satellite services. Available in iOS 18.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Notes Transcription
fields.description: If false, disables transcription in Notes. Available in iOS 18.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Notes Transcription Summary
fields.description: If false, disables transcription summarization in Notes. Available in iOS 18.3.

fields.label: Allowed External Intelligence Workspace I Ds
fields.description: An array of strings, but currently restricted to a single element. If present, Apple Intelligence only allows the given external integration workspace ID to be used, and requires a sign-in to make requests. The user will be required to sign in to integrations that support signing in. Multiple payloads combine using an intersect operation. This means the allowed set of workspace IDs can become the empty set if conflicting values are specified in multiple payloads. Supervised devices with iOS 18.3 or later.

fields.label: Allow Default Browser Modification
fields.description: If false, disables default browser preference modification. The MDM Settings command to set the default browser preference will still work when this is applied. Available in iOS 18.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Adding Game Center Friends
fields.description: If false, the system prohibits adding friends to Game Center. Available in iOS 4.2.1 and later, and macOS 10.13 and later. Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Cloud Private Relay
fields.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Private Relay. Available in iOS 15 and later, and in macOS 12 and later. Requires a supervised device in iOS. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices and with managed Apple IDs is deprecated. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Find My Friends Modification
fields.description: If false, the system disables changes to Find My Friends. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 7 and later. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Fingerprint Modification
fields.description: If false, the system prevents the user from modifying Touch ID or Face ID. Available in iOS 8.3 and later, and macOS 14 and later. Requires a supervised device in iOS. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow NFC
fields.description: If false, the system disables NFC. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 14.2 and later. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Camera
fields.description: If false, disables the camera, and its icon is removed from the Home screen. Users are unable to take photographs. As of iOS 13, requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 4 and later, and macOS 10.11 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Video Conferencing
fields.description: If false, disables video conferencing. As of iOS 13, requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 4 and later.n Default: true.

Force Classroom Automatically Join Classes
fields.description: If true, automatically gives permission to the teacher's requests without prompting the student. Requires a supervised device. Version: iOS 11+ Default: false.

fields.label: Force Classroom Request Permission To Leave Classes
fields.description: If true, a student enrolled in an unmanaged course through Classroom requests permission from the teacher when attempting to leave the course. Requires a supervised device. Version: iOS 11.3+ Default: false.

fields.label: Force Classroom Unprompted App And Device Lock
fields.description: If true, allows the teacher to lock apps or the device without prompting the student. Requires a supervised device. Version: iOS 11+ Default: false.

fields.label: Force Classroom Unprompted Screen Observation
fields.description: If true and ScreenObservationPermissionModificationAllowed is also true in the Education payload, a student enrolled in a managed course via the Classroom app automatically gives permission to that course teacher's requests to observe the student's screen without prompting the student. Requires a supervised device. Version: iOS 11+ Default: false.

fields.label: Force Delayed Software Updates
fields.description: If set to true, delays user visibility of software updates.

fields.label: Enforced Software Update Delay
fields.description: Specify a number of days to delay a software update on the device (max. 90 days).

fields.label: Force Automatic Date And Time
fields.description: If set to true, the Date & Time “Set Automatically” feature is turned on and canʼt be turned off by the user. Note: The deviceʼs time zone will only be updated when the device can determine its location (cellular connection or wifi with location services enabled). Version: iOS 12.0

fields.label: Allow Password Auto Fill
fields.description: If set to false, users will not be able to use the AutoFill Passwords feature on iOS and will not be prompted to use a saved password in Safari or in apps. If set to false, Automatic Strong Passwords will also be disabled and strong passwords will not be suggested to users. Version: iOS 12.0

fields.label: Allow Password Proximity Requests
fields.description: If set to false, a userʼs device will not request passwords from nearby devices. Defaults to true.

fields.label: Allow Password Sharing
fields.description: If set to false, users can not share their passwords with the Airdrop Passwords feature.

fields.label: Allow Managed To Write Unmanaged Contacts
fields.description: If set to true, managed apps can write contacts to unmanaged contacts accounts. if allowOpenFromManagedToUnmanaged is true, this restriction has no effect. A payload that sets this to true must be installed via MDM.

fields.label: Allow Unmanaged To Read Managed Contacts
fields.description: If set to true, unmanaged apps can read from managed contacts accounts. if allowOpenFromManagedToUnmanaged is true, this restriction has no effect. A payload that sets this to true must be installed via MDM.

fields.label: Allow Esim Modification
fields.description: If set to false, the user may not remove or add a cellular plan to the eSIM on the device.

fields.label: Allow Spell Check
fields.description: If set to false, disables keyboard spell-check.

fields.label: Allow Predictive Keyboard
fields.description: If set to false, disables predictive keyboards.

fields.label: Allow Auto Correction
fields.description: If set to false, disables keyboard auto-correction.

fields.label: Allow Dictation
fields.description: If set to false, disallows dictation input.

fields.label: Force Wi-Fi Power On
fields.description: If true, prevents turning off the Wi-Fi in the settings. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 13 and later.n Default: false.

fields.label: Allow Continuous Path Keyboard
fields.description: If false, disables continuous path keyboard. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 13 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Files Network Drive Access
fields.description: If false, prevents connecting to network drives in the Files app, Available in iOS 13.0 and later.

fields.label: Allow Files USB Drive Access
fields.description: If false, prevents connecting to any connected USB devices in the Files app. Available in iOS 13.0 and later.

fields.label: Allow Find My Device
fields.description: If false, disables Find My Device in the Find My App. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 13 and later.

fields.label: Allow Find My Friends
fields.description: If false, disables Find My Friends in the Find my app. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 13 and later.

fields.label: Allow Shared Device Temporary Session
fields.description: If false, temporary sessions aren’t available on Shared iPad. Available in iOS 13.4 and later.

fields.label: Allow VPN Creation
fields.description: If false, disables the creation of VPN configurations.

fields.label: Allow App Clips
fields.description: If false, prevents a user from adding any App Clips, and removes any existing App Clips on the device. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 14.0 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Apple Personalized Advertising
fields.description: If false, limits Apple personalized advertising. Available in iOS 14 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Auto Unlock
fields.description: If false, disallows auto unlock. Available in macOS 10.12 and later, and iOS 14.5 and later. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Unpaired External Boot To Recovery
fields.description: If true, allows devices to be booted into recovery by an unpaired device. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 14.5 and later. Default: false.

fields.label: Force On Device Only Dictation
fields.description: If true, disables connections to Siri servers for the purposes of dictation. Available in iOS 14.5 and later. Default: false.

fields.label: Force On Device Only Translation
fields.description: If true, the device won’t connect to Siri servers for the purposes of translation. Available in iOS 15 and later. Default: false.

fields.label: Require Managed Pasteboard
fields.description: If true, copy and paste functionality respects the allowOpenFromManagedToUnmanaged and allowOpenFromUnmanagedToManaged restrictions. Default: false.

fields.label: Allow Mail Privacy Protection
fields.description: If true, it hides your IP address so senders can’t link it to your other online activity or determine your location. It also prevents senders from seeing if you’ve opened the email they sent you. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 15.1 and later. Default: false.

fields.label: Allow Rapid Security Response Installation
fields.description: If set to false, rapid security responses can't be installed. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Rapid Security Response Removal
fields.description: If set to false, rapid security responses can't be removed. Default: true.

fields.label: Allowi Phone Widgets On MAC
fields.description: If false, disallows iPhone widgets on a Mac that has signed in the same AppleID for iCloud. n Available on iOS 17+. Supervised only.

fields.label: Allow Marketplace App Installation
fields.description: If false, the system prevents installation of alternative marketplace apps from the web and prevents any installed alternative marketplace apps from installing apps. n Available in iOS 17.4 and later.

fields.label: Allow Genmoji
fields.description: If false, prohibits creating new Genmoji. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 18 and later.

fields.label: Allow Image Playground
fields.description: If false, prohibits the use of image generation. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 18 and later and macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Allow I Phone Mirroring
fields.description: If false, prohibits the use of iPhone Mirroring. When used on macOS, this prevents the Mac from mirroring any iPhone. When used on iOS, this prevents the iPhone from mirroring to any Mac. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 18 and later and macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Allow Writing Tools
fields.description: If false, disables Apple Intelligence writing tools. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 18 and later and macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Allow Auto Dim
fields.description: If false, disables auto dim on iPads with OLED displays.Requires a supervised device in iOS. Available in iOS 17.4 and later.

fields.label: Allow Esim Outgoing Transfers
fields.description: If false, prevents the transfer of an eSIM from the device on which the restriction is installed to a different device. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 18 and later.

fields.label: Allow Image Wand
fields.description: If false, prohibits the use of Image Wand. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 18 and later.

fields.label: Allow Live Voicemail
fields.description: If false, the system disables live voicemail on the device. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 17.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Personalized Handwriting Results
fields.description: If false, prevents the system from generating text in the user’s handwriting. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 18 and later.

fields.label: Allow Web Distribution App Installation
fields.description: If false, the device prevents installation of apps directly from the web. Available in iOS 17.5 and later.

fields.label: Force Preserve Esim On Erase
fields.description: If true, the system preserves eSIM when it erases the device due to too many failed password attempts or the Erase. All Content and Settings option in Settings > General > Reset. Available in iOS 17.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Apps To Be Hidden
fields.description: If set to false, the user is prevented from hiding the app. It does not affect the user's ability to leave it in the App Library, while removing it from the home screen. Available in iOS 18.0 and later.

fields.label: Allow Apps To Be Locked
fields.description: If set to false, the user is prevented from locking the app. Because hiding an app also requires locking it, disallowing the user from locking the app will also prevent the user from hiding it. Available in iOS 18.0 and later.

fields.label: Allow Call Recording
fields.description: Available in iOS 18.1 and later.

fields.label: Allow Mail Summary
fields.description: Available in iOS 18.1 and macOS 15.1 and later.

fields.label: Allow RCS Messaging
fields.description: Available in iOS 18.1 and later.

fields.label: Allow External Intelligence Integrations
fields.description: If false, disables the use of external, cloud-based intelligence services with Siri. Available in iOS 18.2.

fields.label: Allow External Intelligence Integrations Sign In
fields.description: If false, forces external intelligence providers into anonymous mode. If a user is already signed in to an external intelligence provider, applying this restriction will cause them to be signed out. Available in iOS 18.2.

fields.label: Disable Jailbreak Detection
fields.description: Whether jailbreak detection should be skipped for the device. If enabled the Relution Agent will always report `false` for the {@link Device#isJailbroken device jailbreak status} . This is managed by the Relution server and is not part of the restriction configuration payload.

fields.label: Allow Safari Private Browsing
fields.description: If false, the system disables the ability to use private browsing in Safari. Available in iOS 26 and later.

fields.label: Allow Safari History Clearing
fields.description: If false, the system disables the ability to clear browsing history in Safari. Available in iOS 26 and later.

fields.label: Allowed Camera Restriction Bundle I Ds
fields.description: If present, the system exempts apps with bundle IDs in the array from the allowCamera restriction. The system doesn’t grant these apps access to the camera automatically; they’re only exempted from the allowCamera restriction. This key has no effect when the camera isn’t restricted. Multiple payloads combine using an intersect operation. n Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 26 and later.

fields.label: URL
fields.description: The SCEP URL.

fields.label: Subject
fields.description: The representation of an X.500 name as an array of OID and value. For example, /C=US/O=Apple Inc. translates to [ [ ["C", "US"] ], [ ["O", "Apple Inc."] ] ].

fields.label: Subject Alternative Names
fields.description: The SCEP payload can specify an optional SubjectAltName dictionary that provides values required by the CA for issuing a certificate. You can specify a single string or an array of strings for each key.

fields.label: Retries
fields.description: The number of times the device should retry if the server sends a PENDING response.

fields.label: Retry Delay
fields.description: The number of seconds to wait between subsequent retries. The first retry is attempted without this delay.

fields.label: Challenge
fields.description: A preshared secret.

fields.label: Fingerprint
fields.description: The fingerprint of the Certificate Authority certificate.

fields.label: Allow All Apps Access
fields.description: If true, all apps have access to the private key. Default: false.

fields.label: Key Is Extractable
fields.description: If false, the system disables exporting the private key from the keychain. Default: true.

fields.label: Auto Deployments Disabled
fields.description: If `true`, the logged in user's auto deployments will not be performed. This can e.g. be used for shared devices designated to be used in lesson mode only to speed up user switching.

fields.label: Enforce Login Via App Lock
fields.description: If `true`, lock the Relution client until a user has signed in. If `false`, only whitelist the Relution client (Settings is whitelisted by default). Defaults to `true` to stay backwards compatible. NOTE: When not enforced, the user has to manually open the Relution client to login in order to get further apps whitelisted/installed. However, the whitelist approach has the advantage of always having access to the Settings app. This allows the user to change the WiFi even if not logged in to Relution (e.g. if a student takes a shared device home).

fields.label: Allow Login Via QR Code
fields.description: If `true`, the Relution Client will show an option in the login screen to log in via QR code. The QR code is a AccessToken with. SHARED_DEVICE_LOGIN as scope value.

fields.label: Enable Scheduled Logout
fields.description: a flag to disable/enable the scheduled logout.

fields.label: Scheduled Logout Delay
fields.description: the amount of minutes between the last login and the automatic logout.

fields.label: Disable SSO Login
fields.description: Whether the login screen on a shared device offers SSO login options. When set, SSO is disallowed on shared devices so that only username and password is visible.

fields.label: Lock Screen Footnote
fields.description: iOS 9.3.1 or later.

fields.label: Temporary Session Only
fields.description: If `true`, the user only sees the Guest Welcome pane and can only log in as a guest user. If `false`, the user can sign in with a managed Apple ID (the existing behavior). Available in iOS 14.5+

fields.label: Temporary Session Timeout
fields.description: The timeout, in seconds, for the temporary session. The temporary session logs out automatically after the specified period of inactivity. The minimum value is 30 seconds. Setting this value to 0 removes the timeout. Available in iOS 14.5+

fields.label: User Session Timeout
fields.description: The timeout, in seconds, for the user session. The user session logs out automatically after the specified period of inactivity. The minimum value is 30 seconds. Setting this value to 0 removes the timeout. Available in iOS 14.5 and later.

fields.label: Quota Size
fields.description: The quota size, in megabytes (MB), for each user on the shared device, or if the quota size is too small, the minimum quota size. If a value for quotaSize and residentUsers is provided, the value of quotaSize is used.

fields.label: Resident Users
fields.description: The expected number of users. If this value is greater than the value for the maximum possible number of users that the device supports, the MDM server uses maximum possible number instead.

fields.label: Courses
fields.description: Ids of courses which should be available to login from the sharedIpad. IosEducationConfiguration.

fields.label: Block Relution User Change
fields.description: A Relution flag, which will block the automatic relution user assignment. When true, will always leave the assigned user as is.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Certificate Password To Set
FDE FileVault Certificate Subject Uids
fields.description: Prepared for using an Embeddable type if we want to store more metadata than the subject UID in the future.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Certificate Common Name
fields.description: This field is abbreviated if the actual value is longer than 512 characters. The field should mostly be used for presentation purpose. For actual logic, is safer to load the data from resource.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Certificate Distinguished Name
fields.description: This field is abbreviated if the actual value is longer than 4000 characters. The field should mostly be used for presentation purpose. For actual logic, is safer to load the data from resource.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Certificate Organizational Unit
fields.description: This field is abbreviated if the actual value is longer than 512 characters. The field should mostly be used for presentation purpose. For actual logic, is safer to load the data from resource.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Certificate Serial Number
fields.description: This field is abbreviated if the actual value is longer than 255 characters. The field should mostly be used for presentation purpose. For actual logic, is safer to load the data from resource. The serial number is stored in decimal format.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Certificate Revocation List UUID
fields.description: CRL of this certificate. The value is set once upon creation of the certificate. It is used as part of the URL coded as CRL distribution point. Therefore this is fixed upon certificate generation. Notice, the uuid references the CRL controlling revocation of this certificate. It is not the CRL for issued certificates when this certificate is used a CA.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Certificate Password Is Set
FDE FileVault Certificate File UUID
fields.description: Return unique identifier for domain object.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Certificate File Content Type
FDE FileVault Certificate File Modification Date
FDE FileVault Defer
fields.description: If true, the system defers enabling FileVault until the designated user logs out. For details, see fdesetup(8). Only a local user or a mobile account user can enable FileVault.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Defer Dont Ask At User Logout
fields.description: If true, the system prevents requests to enable FileVault at user logout time.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Defer Force At User Login Max Bypass Attempts
fields.description: The maximum number of times users can bypass enabling FileVault before the system requires the user to enable it to log in. If the value is 0, the system requires the user to enable FileVault the next time they attempt to log in. Set this key to –1 to disable this feature.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Output Path
fields.description: The path to the location of the recovery key and computer information property list.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Password
fields.description: The password of the Open Directory user to add to FileVault. Use the UserEntersMissingInfo key to prompt for this information.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Show Recovery Key
fields.description: If false, the system prevents display of the personal recovery key to the user after the system enables FileVault.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Use Key Chain
fields.description: If true and you don’t include certificate information in this payload, the system uses the keychain created at /Library/Keychains/FileVaultMaster.keychain when it adds the institutional recovery key.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Use Recovery Key
fields.description: If true, the system creates a personal recovery key and displays it to the user.

fields.label: FDE FileVault User Enters Missing Info
fields.description: If true, the system enables a prompt for missing user name or password fields.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Username
fields.description: The user name of the Open Directory user to add to FileVault.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Options Destroy Fv Key On Standby
fields.description: If true, the system won’t store the FileVault key across restarts.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Options Dont Allow FDE Disable
fields.description: If true, the system won’t disable FileVault.

fields.label: FDE FileVault Options Dont Allow FDE Enable
fields.description: If true, the system won’t enable FileVault.

fields.label: Enable Recovery Key Escrow
fields.description: The FDE Recovery Key Escrow configuration is represented as an option. If enabled relution server uses a generated certificate.

fields.label: Prohibit Burn
fields.description: If true, the system disables the Finder’s burn support.

fields.label: Prohibit Connect To
fields.description: If true, the system disables Connect to Server.

fields.label: Prohibit Eject
fields.description: If true, the system disables Eject.

fields.label: Prohibit Go To Folder
fields.description: If true, the system disables Go to Folder.

fields.label: Show External Hard Drives On Desktop
fields.description: If false, the system doesn’t show external hard drives on the Desktop.

fields.label: Show Hard Drives On Desktop
fields.description: If false, the system doesn’t show internal hard drives on the Desktop.

fields.label: Show Mounted Servers On Desktop
fields.description: If false, the system doesn’t show mounted file servers on the Desktop.

fields.label: Show Removable Media On Desktop
fields.description: If false, the system doesn’t show removable media items on the Desktop.

fields.label: Warn On Empty Trash
fields.description: If false, the system doesn’t warn the user before emptying the trash.

fields.label: Allow Signed
fields.description: If true, the system allows built-in software to receive incoming connections. Available in macOS 12.3 and later.

fields.label: Allow Signed App
fields.description: If true, the system allows downloaded signed software to receive incoming connections. Available in macOS 12.3 and later.

fields.label: Block All Incoming
fields.description: If true, the system enables blocking all incoming connections.

fields.label: Enable Firewall
fields.description: (Required) If true, the system enables the firewall.

fields.label: Enable Stealth Mode
fields.description: If true, the system enables stealth mode.

fields.label: Applications
fields.description: The list of apps with connections that the firewall controls.

fields.label: Auto Log Out Delay
fields.description: The auto log out delay (in seconds). A value of zero, means auto-logout is off. In some cases, this value may be restricted to values between 5 minutes and 24 hours.

fields.label: Multiple Session Enabled
fields.description: If set to false, fast user switching is disabled.

fields.label: Allowed Kernel Extensions
fields.description: The dictionary that represents a set of kernel extensions that the system always allows to load on the computer. The dictionary maps team identifiers (keys) to arrays of bundle identifiers.

fields.label: Allow Non Admin User Approvals
fields.description: If true, nonadministrative users can approve additional kernel extensions in the Security & Privacy preferences. Available in macOS 11 and later.

fields.label: Allowed Team Identifiers
fields.description: The array of team identifiers that define which validly signed kernel extensions can load.

fields.label: Allow User Overrides
fields.description: If true, users can approve additional kernel extensions that configuration profiles don’t explicitly allow.

fields.label: Managed Login Items Auto Launched Applications
fields.description: A list of items to be launched automatically.

fields.label: Login Window Login Items Disable Login Items Suppression
fields.description: If true, the system prevents the user from disabling login item launches by using the Shift key.

fields.label: Login Window Allow List
fields.description: The list of user GUIDs or group GUIDs of users that the system allows to log in. An asterisk (*) string specifies all users or groups.

fields.label: Login Window Autologin Password To Set
Login Window Autologin Username
fields.description: The user short name to set up auto login.

fields.label: Login Window Deny List
fields.description: The list of user GUIDs or group GUIDs of users that the system disallows to log in. This list takes priority over the list in the AllowList key.

fields.label: Login Window Disable Console Access
fields.description: If true, the system disregards the >console special user name, which provides a command line UI.

fields.label: Login Window Disable FDE Auto Login
fields.description: If true, the system disables the automatic login option when using FileVault.

fields.label: Login Window Disable Screen Lock Immediate
fields.description: If true, the system disables the immediate Screen Lock functions. Available in macOS 10.13 and later.

fields.label: Login Window Hide Admin Users
fields.description: If true, the system hides administrator users when showing a user list.

fields.label: Login Window Hide Local Users
fields.description: If true, the system shows only network and system users when showing a user list.

fields.label: Login Window Hide Mobile Accounts
fields.description: If true, the system hides mobile account users in a user list. In some cases, mobile users show up as network users.

fields.label: Login Window Include Network User
fields.description: If true, the system shows network users when showing a user list.

fields.label: Login Window Login Window Text
fields.description: The text to display in the login window.

fields.label: Login Window Log Out Disabled While Logged In
fields.description: If true, the system disables the Log Out menu item when the user is logged in. Available in macOS 10.13 and later.

fields.label: Login Window Power Off Disabled While Logged In
fields.description: If true, the system disables the Power Off menu item when the user is logged in.

fields.label: Login Window Restart Disabled
fields.description: If true, the system disables the Restart item.

fields.label: Login Window Restart Disabled While Logged In
fields.description: If true, the system disables the Restart menu item when the user is logged in.

fields.label: Login Window Show Fullname
fields.description: If true, the system shows the name and password dialog. If false, the system displays a list of users.

fields.label: Login Window Show Other Users Managed
fields.description: If true, the system displays “Other…” when it shows a list of users.

fields.label: Login Window Show Input Menu
fields.description: If true, the system shows the Input Menu in the login window.

fields.label: Login Window Shut Down Disabled
fields.description: If true, the system disables the Shut Down button.

fields.label: Login Window Sleep Disabled
fields.description: If true, the system disables the Sleep button.

fields.label: Login Window Shut Down Disabled While Logged In
fields.description: If true, the system disables the Shut Down menu item when the user is logged in.

fields.label: Login Window Scripts Login Scripts
fields.description: An array of one or more dictionaries of scripts to run at user login time.

fields.label: Login Window Scripts Logout Scripts
fields.description: An array of one or more dictionaries of scripts to run at user logout time.

fields.label: Login Window Scripts Skip Login Hook
fields.description: If true, the system doesn’t execute the login scripts during login.

fields.label: Login Window Scripts Skip Logout Hook
fields.description: If true, the system doesn’t execute the logout scripts during logout.

fields.label: Proxies Exceptions List
fields.description: The list of hosts and domains that should bypass proxy settings.

fields.label: Proxies Ftp Enable
fields.description: If true, enables FTP proxy.

fields.label: Proxies Ftp Passive
fields.description: If true, enables passive FTP mode.

fields.label: Proxies Ftp Port
fields.description: The FTP proxy port.

fields.label: Proxies Ftp Proxy
fields.description: The host name or IP address for the FTP proxy.

fields.label: Proxies Gopher Enable
fields.description: If true, enables gopher proxy.

fields.label: Proxies Gopher Port
fields.description: The gopher proxy port.

fields.label: Proxies Gopher Proxy
fields.description: The host name or IP address for the gopher proxy.

fields.label: Proxies HTTP Enable
fields.description: If true, enables web proxy.

fields.label: Proxies HTTP Port
fields.description: The web proxy port.

fields.label: Proxies HTTP Proxy
fields.description: The host name or IP address for the web proxy.

fields.label: Proxies HTTPS Enable
fields.description: If true, enables secure web proxy.

fields.label: Proxies HTTPS Port
fields.description: The secure web proxy port.

fields.label: Proxies HTTPS Proxy
fields.description: The host name or IP address for the secure web proxy.

fields.label: Proxies Proxy Auto Config Enable
fields.description: If true, enables automatic proxy configuration.

fields.label: Proxies Proxy Auto Config URL String
fields.description: The automatic proxy configuration URL.

fields.label: Proxies Rtsp Enable
fields.description: If true, enable streaming proxy.

fields.label: Proxies Rtsp Port
fields.description: The streaming proxy port.

fields.label: Proxies Rtsp Proxy
fields.description: The host name or IP address for the streaming proxy.

fields.label: Proxies Socks Enable
fields.description: If true, enable the SOCKS proxy.

fields.label: Proxies Socks Port Integer
fields.description: The SOCKS proxy port.

fields.label: Proxies Socks Proxy
fields.description: The host name or IP address for the SOCKS proxy.

fields.label: Proxies Fall Back Allowed
fields.description: If 1, enables cellular fallback. Default is 1. For managed devices, if not supplied, the default is 0.

fields.label: Content Filter
fields.description: The payload you use to configure the parental control web content filters.

fields.label: Content Filter Restrict Web
fields.description: If true, enables web content filters.

fields.label: Content Filter Use Content Filter
fields.description: If true, filters content automatically.

fields.label: Content Filter White List Enabled
fields.description: If true, enables web content filters.

fields.label: Content Filter Filter Black List
fields.description: The array of URLs that defines a deny list. When restrictWeb and useContentFilter are enabled, no URLs in the deny list are available to the user.

fields.label: Content Filter Filter White List
fields.description: The array of URLs that defines an allow list. When restrictWeb and useContentFilter are enabled, only URLs in the allow list are available to the user.

fields.label: Content Filter Site White List
fields.description: An array of sites that defines an allow list. If specified, this defines additional allowed sites besides those in the automated allow list and deny list, including disallowed adult sites. This key is required if whiteListEnabled is true.

fields.label: Dictionary
fields.description: The payload you use to configure parental control dictionary restrictions.

fields.label: Dictionary Parental Control
fields.description: If true, enables parental controls dictionary restrictions.

fields.label: Time Limits
fields.description: The payload you use to configure parental control time limits.

fields.label: Time Limits Family Controls Enabled
fields.description: If true, enables time limits.

fields.label: Time Limits Weekday Allowance
fields.description: Time limit DTO for MacOS Parental Controls time limits configuration.

fields.label: Time Limits Weekday Allowance Seconds Per Day
Time Limits Weekday Curfew
fields.description: Time limit DTO for MacOS Parental Controls time limits configuration.

fields.label: Time Limits Weekday Curfew Seconds Per Day
Time Limits Weekend Allowance
fields.description: Time limit DTO for MacOS Parental Controls time limits configuration.

fields.label: Time Limits Weekend Allowance Seconds Per Day
Time Limits Weekend Curfew
fields.description: Time limit DTO for MacOS Parental Controls time limits configuration.

fields.label: Time Limits Weekend Curfew Seconds Per Day
Game Center
fields.description: The payload you use to configure Game Center parental controls.

fields.label: Game Center Account Modification Allowed
fields.description: If true, allows account modifications.

fields.label: App Restrictions
fields.description: The payload you use to configure the parental control app restrictions.

fields.label: App Restrictions Family Controls Enabled
fields.description: If true, enables app access restrictions.

fields.label: App Restrictions White List
fields.description: The allow list of app item dictionaries.

fields.label: Allow Safari Summary
fields.description: If false, the system disables the ability to summarize content in Safari. Available in macOS 15.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Mail Smart Replies
fields.description: If false, disables smart replies in Mail. Available in macOS 15.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Apple Intelligence Report
fields.description: If false, the system disables Apple Intelligence reports. Available in macOS 15.4.

fields.label: Rating Tv Shows
fields.description: The maximum level of TV content allowed on the device. Available in macOS 15 and later. Possible values, with the US description of the rating level: n 1000: All 600: TV-MA 500: TV-14 400: TV-PG 300: TV-G 200: TV-Y7 100: TV-Y.

fields.label: Rating Movies
fields.description: The maximum level of movie content allowed on the device. Available in macOS 15 and later. Possible values, with the US description of the rating level: n 1000: All 500: NC-17 400: R 300: PG-13 200: PG 100: G 0: None.

fields.label: Rating Apps
fields.description: The maximum level of app content allowed on the device. Preinstalled (first party) apps ignore this restriction. Available in macOS 15 and later. Possible values, with the US description of the rating level: n 1000: All 600: 17+ 300: 12+ 200: 9+ 100: 4+ 0: None.

fields.label: Force Bypass Screen Capture Alert
fields.description: If true, then the system bypasses the presentation of a screen capture alert. Available in macOS 15.1 and later.

fields.label: Allow Explicit Content
fields.description: If false, the system hides explicit music or video content purchased from the iTunes Store. The system marks explicit content as such by content providers, such as record labels, when sold through the iTunes. Store. Explicit content in the News and Podcast apps is also hidden. Available in macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Allow Bookstore Erotica
fields.description: If false, the system prevents the user from downloading Apple Books media that’s tagged as erotica. Available in macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Allow Bookstore
fields.description: If false, the system removes the Book Store tab from the Books app. Available in macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Allow Notes Transcription
fields.description: If false, disables transcription in Notes. Available in macOS 15.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Notes Transcription Summary
fields.description: If false, disables transcription summarization in Notes. Available in macOS 15.3 and later.

fields.label: Allowed External Intelligence Workspace I Ds
fields.description: An array of strings, but currently restricted to a single element. If present, Apple Intelligence only allows the given external integration workspace ID to be used, and requires a sign-in to make requests. The user will be required to sign in to integrations that support signing in. Multiple payloads combine using an intersect operation. This means the allowed set of workspace IDs can become the empty set if conflicting values are specified in multiple payloads. macOS 15.3 or later.

fields.label: Allow Password Auto Fill
fields.description: If set to false, users will not be able to use the AutoFill Passwords feature on iOS and will not be prompted to use a saved password in Safari or in apps. If set to false, Automatic Strong Passwords will also be disabled and strong passwords will not be suggested to users. Version: iOS 12.0

fields.label: Allow Password Proximity Requests
fields.description: If set to false, a userʼs device will not request passwords from nearby devices. Defaults to true.

fields.label: Allow Password Sharing
fields.description: If set to false, users can not share their passwords with the Airdrop Passwords feature.

fields.label: Allow Air Drop
fields.description: If set to false, AirDrop is disabled. Available in iOS 7 and later, and macOS 10.13 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Adding Game Center Friends
fields.description: If false, prohibits adding friends to Game Center. As of iOS 13, requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 4.2.1 and later, and macOS 10.13 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Diagnostic Submission
fields.description: If false, prevents the device from automatically submitting diagnostic reports to Apple. Available in iOS 6 and later, and macOS 10.13 and later. Also available for user enrollment.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Dictation
fields.description: If false, disallows dictation input. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 10.3 and later, and macOS 10.13 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Passcode Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents the device passcode from being added, changed, or removed. This restriction is ignored by Shared iPads. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 9 and later, and macOS 10.13 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Remote Screen Observation
fields.description: If false, disables remote screen observation by the Classroom app. Nest this key beneath allowScreenShot as a subrestriction. If allowScreenShot is set to false, the Classroom app doesn't observe remote screens. Required a supervised device until iOS 13 and macOS 10.15. Available in iOS 12 and later, and macOS 10.14.4 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Screen Shot
fields.description: If false, disables saving a screenshot of the display and capturing a screen recording. It also disables the Classroom app from observing remote screens. Available in iOS 4 and later, and macOS 10.14.4 and later. Also available for user enrollment.n Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Wallpaper Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents wallpaper from being changed. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 9 and later, and macOS 10.13 and later.n Default: true.

fields.label: Enforced Software Update Delay
fields.description: Sets how many days to delay a software update on the device. With this restriction in place, the user doesn't see a software update until the specified number of days after the software update release date. This value is used by forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates and forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates. Requires a supervised device in iOS and tvOS. Available in iOS 11.3 and later, macOS 10.13.4 and later, and tvOS 12.2 and later.n Default: 30 Minimum: 1 Maximum: 90.

fields.label: Force Classroom Automatically Join Classes
fields.description: If true, automatically gives permission to the teacher's requests without prompting the student. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 11 and later, and macOS 10.14.4 and later.n Default: false.

fields.label: Force Classroom Request Permission To Leave Classes
fields.description: If true, a student enrolled in an unmanaged course through Classroom requests permission from the teacher when attempting to leave the course. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 11.3 and later, and macOS 10.14.4 and later.n Default: false.

fields.label: Force Classroom Unprompted App And Device Lock
fields.description: If true, allows the teacher to lock apps or the device without prompting the student. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 11 and later, and macOS 10.14.4 and later.n Default: false.

fields.label: Force Delayed App Software Updates
fields.description: If true, delays user visibility of non-OS Software Updates. Requires a supervised device. Visibility of Operating System updates is controlled through forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates. The delay is 30 days unless enforcedSoftwareUpdateDelay is set to another value. Available in macOS 11 and later.n Default: false.

fields.label: Force Delayed Software Updates
fields.description: If true, delays user visibility of software updates. In macOS, seed build updates are allowed, without delay. Requires a supervised device in iOS and tvOS. The delay is 30 days unless enforcedSoftwareUpdateDelay is set to another value. Available in iOS 11.3 and later, macOS 10.13 and later, and tvOS 12.2 and later.n Default: false.

fields.label: Allow UI Configuration Profile Installation
fields.description: If 'false', prohibits the user from installing configuration profiles and certificates interactively. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 6 and later and macOS 13 and later. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow USB Restricted Mode
fields.description: If 'false', allows the device to always connect to USB accessories while locked. On macOS, allows new USB accessories to connect without authorization. This value is ignored if Lockdown mode is enabled. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 11.4.1 and later and macOS 13 and later. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Universal Control
fields.description: If 'false', disables Universal Control. Available in macOS 13 and later. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Rapid Security Response Installation
fields.description: If set to false, rapid security responses can't be installed. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Rapid Security Response Removal
fields.description: If set to false, rapid security responses can't be removed. Default: true.

fields.label: Allow Air Play Incoming Requests
fields.description: If false, disables incoming AirPlay requests. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in macOS 12.3 and later, and tvOS 10.2 and later.

fields.label: Allow Apple Personalized Advertising
fields.description: If false, limits Apple personalized advertising. n Available in iOS 14 and later and macOS 12 and later.

fields.label: Allow Bluetooth Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents modification of Bluetooth settings. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 11 and later.

fields.label: Allow Cloud Private Relay
fields.description: If false, disables iCloud Private Relay. n For iOS devices, this restriction requires a supervised device. n Available in macOS 12 and later, and iOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Allow Definition Lookup
fields.description: If false, disables definition lookup. n Requires a supervised device on iOS. n Available in iOS 8.1.3 and later and macOS 10.11 and later.

fields.label: Allow Erase Content And Settings
fields.description: If false, disables the Erase All Content And Settings option in the Reset UI. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 8 and later, and macOS 12 and later.

fields.label: Allow Find My Device
fields.description: If false, disables Find My Device in the Find My app. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 13 and later.

fields.label: Allow Find My Friends
fields.description: If false, disables Find My Friends in the Find My app. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 13 and later.

fields.label: Enforced Fingerprint Timeout
fields.description: The value, in seconds, after which the fingerprint unlock requires a password to authenticate. The default value is 48 hours. n Available in macOS 12 and later.

fields.label: Enforced Software Update Major OS Deferred Install Delay
fields.description: This restriction allows the admin to set how many days to delay a major software upgrade on the device. When this restriction is in place the user sees a software upgrade only after the specified delay after the release of the software upgrade. This value controls the delay for forceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates. n Available in macOS 11.3 and later.

fields.label: Enforced Software Update Minor OS Deferred Install Delay
fields.description: This restriction allows the admin to set how many days to delay a minor OS software update on the device. When this restriction is in place the user see a software update only after the specified delay after the release of the software update. This value controls the delay for forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates.

fields.label: Enforced Software Update Non OS Deferred Install Delay
fields.description: This restriction allows the admin to set how many days to delay an app software update on the device. When this restriction is in place the user sees a non-OS software update only after the specified delay after the release of the software. This value controls the delay for forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates. n Available in macOS 11.3 and later.

fields.label: Force Assistant Profanity Filter
fields.description: If true, forces the use of the profanity filter assistant. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 11 and later and macOS 10.13 and later.

fields.label: Force Classroom Unprompted Screen Observation
fields.description: If true and ScreenObservationPermissionModificationAllowed is also true in the Education payload, a student enrolled in a managed course via the Classroom app automatically gives permission to that course teacher’s requests to observe the student’s screen without prompting the student. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 11 and later, and macOS 10.14.4 and later.

fields.label: Force Delayed Major Software Updates
fields.description: If set to true, delays user visibility of major upgrades to OS Software. n Available in macOS 11.3 and later.

fields.label: Safari Allow Auto Fill
fields.description: If false, disables Safari AutoFill for passwords, contact info, and credit cards and also prevents the Keychain from being used for AutoFill. Though third-party password managers are allowed and apps can use AutoFill. n As of iOS 13, requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 4 and later, and macOS 10.13 and later.

fields.label: Allow Account Modification
fields.description: If false, disables account modification. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 7 and later, macOS 14 and later, and watchOS 10 and later.

fields.label: Allow ARD Remote Management Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents modifying the Remote Management Sharing setting in System Settings. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Assistant
fields.description: If false, disables Siri. n Available in iOS 5 and later and macOS 14 and later. n Also available for user enrollment.

fields.label: Allow Bluetooth Sharing Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents modifying Bluetooth setting in System Settings. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Cloud Freeform
fields.description: If false, disallows iCloud Freeform services. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Device Name Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents the user from changing the device name. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 9 and later, macOS 14 and later, and tvOS 11.0 and later.

fields.label: Allow File Sharing Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents modifying File Sharing setting in System Settings. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Fingerprint Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents the user from modifying Touch ID or Face ID. n Requires a supervised device. n Available in iOS 8.3 and later, and macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Time Machine Backup
fields.description: If false, prevents modification of Time Machine settings in System Settings. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Startup Disk Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents modification of Startup Disk setting in System Settings. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Remote Apple Events Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents modifying Remote Apple Events Sharing setting in System Settings. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Printer Sharing Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents modifying Printer Sharing setting in System Settings. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Local User Creation
fields.description: If false, prevents creating new users in System Settings. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Internet Sharing Modification
fields.description: If false, prevents modifying Internet Sharing setting in System Settings. n Available in macOS 14 and later.

fields.label: Allow Genmoji
fields.description: If false, prohibits creating new Genmoji. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 18 and later.

fields.label: Allow Image Playground
fields.description: If false, prohibits the use of image generation. Requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 18 and later and macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Allow I Phone Mirroring

fields.label: Allow Call Recording

fields.label: Allow Live Voicemail

fields.label: Ask For Password

fields.description: The number of seconds to delay before the password will be required to unlock or stop the screen saver (the grace period). A value of 2147483647 (for example, 0x7FFFFFFF) disables this requirement, and on 10.13, the payload is one of the only ways of disabling the feature. To use this option, you must set `askForPassword` to `true`. macOS 10.13+.

fields.label: Login Window Module Path

fields.label: Allowed System Extension Types

fields.label: Removable System Extensions

The dictionary maps team identifiers (keys) to arrays of bundle identifiers, where the bundle identifier defines the system extension. An application using the OSSystemExtensionDeactivationRequest API can deactivate the specified system extensions without requiring an administrator to authorize the operation. Available in macOS 12 and later.

fields.description: DeviceLock/MinDevicePasswordLength. Specifies the minimum number or characters. Local Accounts will always enforce a minimum password length of 6. Required in the PIN. minLength = null means that no password is required. Always use Replace command instead of Add for Windows10 desktop editions.

fields.label: History
fields.description: DeviceLock/DevicePasswordHistory. Specifies how many passwords can be stored in the history that can’t be used. Max value is not 50 as stated in documentation, but 24.

fields.label: Max Fail Attempts
fields.description: DeviceLock/MaxDevicePasswordFailedAttempts. The number of authentication failures before the device will be wiped (only mobile). Windows desktop will be put on the BitLocker recovery mode, which makes the data inaccessible but recoverable. BitLocker has to be enabled, otherwise this policy cannot apply. Min and Max values are different for desktop (4 <= X <= 16) and mobile (0 <= X <= 999) devices. 0 means that the device is never wiped or set to recovery mode.

fields.label: Max Inactivity Time
fields.description: DeviceLock/MaxInactivityTimeDeviceLock. Specifies the amount of time (in minutes) after the device is idle that will cause the device to become PIN or password locked. 0 means that no timeout is defined.

fields.label: Min Password Age
fields.description: DeviceLock/MinimumPasswordAge. Determines the period of time (in days) that a password must be used before the user can change it. A value of zero means user does not need to change the password. default maxPasswordAge (see GruppenRichtlinienEditor) is 42 and cannot be changed via policy csp, therefore minPasswordAge cannot be higher than 41. BUT if maxPasswordAge is changed to a value smaller than its default, it could lead to a failing request when minPasswordAge ≥ maxPasswordAge!.

fields.label: Require Private Store Only
fields.description: ApplicationManagement/RequirePrivateStoreOnly. Disable the retail catalog and only enable the Private store.

fields.label: Allow Camera
fields.description: Camera/AllowCamera. Disable/Enable camera.

fields.label: Allow Roaming
fields.description: Connectivity/AllowCellularDataRoaming. Allow or disallow cellular data roaming. 0 (false) is not supported in WindowsVersion.V_1511. Therefore this property is only send for versions that are newer. In Future there could be a new annotation created to only "not support" one specific WindowsVersion f.e. V_1607.

fields.label: Allow VPN Over Cellular
fields.description: Connectivity/AllowVPNOverCellular. This policy specifies what type of underline connections VPN is allowed to use.

fields.label: Allow VPN Roaming Over Cellular
fields.description: Connectivity/AllowVPNRoamingOverCellular. This policy when enforced, will prevent the device from connecting VPN when the device roams over cellular networks.

fields.label: Allow Bluetooth
fields.description: Connectivity/AllowBluetooth. Allow the user to enable Bluetooth or restrict access.

fields.label: Allow Cortana
fields.description: Experience/AllowCortana. Specify whether Cortana is allowed at the device.

fields.label: Allow Sync My Settings
fields.description: Experience/AllowSyncMySettings. Allow enterprise to disallow roaming settings among devices (in/from WP device). If not enforced, whether roaming is allowed or not could depend on other factors. depends on other factors.

fields.label: Allow Manual Unenrollment
fields.description: Experience/AllowManualMDMUnenrollment. Specify whether allow the user to delete the workplace account via workplace control panel. The MDM server always could remotely delete the account.

fields.label: Allow Settings
fields.description: Settings/PageVisibilityList. Allows the user to hide specific settings Only the first field is annotated, since all properties are sent to the same endpoint it only has to be checked once.

fields.label: Allow Power And Sleep
fields.description: Settings/AllowPowerAndSleep. Allows the user to change power and sleep settings.

fields.label: Allow Date Time
fields.description: Settings/AllowDateTime. Allows the user to change date and time settings.

fields.label: Allow Region
fields.description: Settings/AllowRegion. Allows the user to change region settings.

fields.label: Allow Language
fields.description: Settings/AllowLanguage. Allows the user to change language settings.

fields.label: Allow VPN
fields.description: Settings/AllowVPN Allows the user to change VPN settings.

fields.label: Allow Workplace
fields.description: Settings/AllowWorkplace. Allows user to change workplace settings.

fields.label: Allow Your Account
fields.description: Settings/AllowYourAccount. Allows user to change account settings.

fields.label: Allow Storage Card
fields.description: System/AllowStorageCard. Disable/enable SD card.

fields.label: Allow User To Reset Device
fields.description: System/AllowUserToResetPhone. Specify whether allow the user to factory reset the phone from setting control panel and hardware key combination.

fields.label: Allow Wi-Fi
fields.description: WiFi/AllowWiFi. Allow or disallow WiFi connection. (Configurable by Exchange as well – definition will be consistent with EAS definition.)

fields.label: Allow Wi-Fi Direct
fields.description: WiFi/AllowWiFiDirect. Allow WiFi Direct connection.

fields.label: Allow Internet Sharing
fields.description: WiFi/AllowInternetSharing. Allow or disallow internet sharing (Configurable by Exchange as well – definition will be consistent with EAS definition.)

fields.label: Allow Auto Connect To Hotspots
fields.description: WiFi/AllowAutoConnectToWiFiSenseHotspots. Allow or disallow the device to automatically connect to Wi-Fi hotspots and friend social network.

fields.label: Allow Manual Wi-Fi Configuration
fields.description: WiFi/AllowManualWiFiConfiguration. Allow or disallow connecting to Wi-Fi outside of MDM server-installed networks.

Select Sleep Button Action On Battery
Turn Off Hybrid Sleep On Battery
Energy Saver Battery Threshold Plugged In
Select Power Button Action Plugged In
Select Sleep Button Action Plugged In

Script
fields.description: Entity to manage script files, their content and necessary metadata in Relution.

fields.label: Script UUID
fields.description: Return unique identifier for domain object.

fields.label: Script Arguments
fields.description: represents an argument string which may be passed to the corresponding script as environment variables.

fields.label: Script Command Line Arguments
fields.description: represents a command line argument string which may be passed to the corresponding script.

fields.label: Script Timeout
fields.description: Duration (in min) the script pauses before terminating when reaching unexecutable task.

fields.label: Script Content
fields.description: Contains the text content of the script.

fields.label: Script Deleted
fields.description: Flag to indicate if a script has been deleted. It is introduced to improve performance for cleaning up script related data.

fields.label: Event Triggers Enabled
fields.description: Enables the use of event based triggers.

fields.label: Event Triggers
fields.description: List of events to trigger the script execution.

fields.label: Scheduled Trigger Enabled
fields.description: Enables the use of a time based trigger.

fields.label: Scheduled Days
fields.description: List of days on which the script execution is triggered.

fields.label: Scheduled Start Time
fields.description: The start time when the script execution is triggered on the specified days.

fields.label: Time Zone
fields.description: The zone of the start time.

fields.label: Disallow Start If On Batteries
fields.description: When true, it disallows the start of a script execution if the device is running on batteries. When false, the task is executed even if the device is running on batteries.

fields.label: Stop If Going On Batteries
fields.description: When true, it stops the script execution task when the device is going onto batteries. When false, the task is not stopped when the device is going onto batteries.

fields.label: Allow Demand Start
fields.description: When true, the script execution task can be started independent of a specified trigger. When false, the task can only be started by defined triggeres.

fields.label: Wake To Run
fields.description: When true, the Task Scheduler will wake the computer when it is time to run the script execution task. When false, the Task Scheduler does not wake the computer.

fields.label: Hidden
fields.description: When true, the task is not visible in the Task Scheduler UI. When false, the task is visible.

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: Windows User ID to specify a user for the LOGON event trigger to only execute scripts when a specific user logs in.

fields.label: Auto Restart Deadline Period For Feature Updates

enumLabels.AUTO_INSTALL_THEN_NOTIFY_USER_TO_SCHEDUL: Auto Install Then Notify User To Schedule Restart
enumLabels.AUTO_INSTALL_AND_RESTART_AT_SPECIFIED_TI: Auto Install And Restart At Specified Time
enumLabels.AUTO_INSTALL_AND_RESTART_WITHOUT_USER_CO: Auto Install And Restart Without User Control

fields.label: Product Version
fields.description: Can provide updates for specified product versions, but must be used together with a valid releaseVersion. Otherwise, this property is ignored on the device. Known valid values for productVersion are: Windows 10 Windows 11 11.

fields.label: Certificate
fields.description: Reduced Dto of Certificate.

fields.label: Certificate Expiration Date
fields.description: Returns the expirationDate of the certificate n Since io.relution.policy.windows.SecureConfiguration and io.relution.policy.windows.HasEapTrustedCertificates used the now removed class of. CertificateBaseInfo, which did not contain the certificate type and expiration date, these fields might be null and need to be refreshed.

fields.label: Certificate Template For Identity Certificate
fields.description: References a CertificateTemplate. If the configuration gets applied on a device, this reference will be resolved and the certificate above will be filled by an issued certificate of this CertificateTemplate.

fields.label: PKCS12 Key Exportable
fields.description: Flag used for PKCS12 certificates if a user can export the certificate. PKCS12 is only exportable if pkcs12KeyLocation is. SOFTWARE.

fields.label: Preshared Key
fields.description: Property for VPN type L2TP.

fields.label: Restrict VPN To App Trigger Ids
Lock Screen Text Color
fields.description: Not supported by all configurations. Will return null if not supported.

fields.label: Lock Screen Text
fields.description: Not supported by all configurations. Will return null if not supported.

fields.label: Lock Screen Image Null
fields.description: Not supported by all configurations. Will return null if not supported.

fields.label: Certificate
fields.description: Reduced Dto of Certificate.

fields.label: Certificate Expiration Date
fields.description: Returns the expirationDate of the certificate n Since io.relution.policy.windows.SecureConfiguration and io.relution.policy.windows.HasEapTrustedCertificates used the now removed class of. CertificateBaseInfo, which did not contain the certificate type and expiration date, these fields might be null and need to be refreshed.

fields.label: Proxy Server
